author: anon-581fd578
content: Phase 2: wiring text shaping into flatten_node_to_render. Need to: (1) detect NodeKind::Text nodes, (2) resolve text content (Static/Dynamic), (3) build FontDescriptor from node style, (4) call text_engine.shape() to get ShapedGlyph vectors, (5) convert ShapedGlyph to PositionedGlyph, (6) set NodeContent::Text(glyphs, color). The text_engine is owned by DesktopRuntime so flatten_node_to_render needs access to it — will pass &mut CosmicTextEngine as a parameter. Also need to upload rasterized glyphs to the GPU atlas texture.
